meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding (Advanced Tutorial)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project ideas. Learn how to build sophisticated user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code in this advanced developer guide.
content.answer_block: The 'no project idea' paralysis is solved by building infrastructure-level features rather than standalone apps. By mastering user onboarding, you create a high-value, reusable component that every SaaS startup demands. Use Antigravity to scaffold the state machine and Claude Code to implement the multi-step UI logic efficiently.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks staring at a blank IDE, paralyzed by the 'what should I build?' dilemma. The truth is, most students fail because they try to build the next Facebook instead of mastering the high-leverage micro-services that actually power the modern SaaS ecosystem.

User onboarding is the heartbeat of product-led growth. It is where engineering meets psychology. By building a robust, data-driven onboarding flow, you aren't just writing code—you are solving a critical business problem that makes you immediately hirable to any CTO.

steps.title: Define the State Machine
steps.description: Onboarding is a finite state machine. We define the transitions between steps to ensure a seamless UX.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine schema for a 4-step SaaS onboarding flow including user profile collection, feature preference tagging, and a final dashboard redirect.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding state machine logic in typescript'

steps.title: Architect the Data Schema
steps.description: Persistence is key. We need to track progress so users can resume their onboarding flow if they drop off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a Prisma schema for an OnboardingProgress model that tracks current step, completion percentage, and user-provided metadata.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'add OnboardingProgress model to schema.prisma'

steps.title: Implement Progress Persistence
steps.description: Connect the frontend state to your database to ensure data integrity across sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Next.js server action to update user onboarding progress based on the current step index.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create server action for updateOnboardingStep'

steps.title: Build the Interactive UI
steps.description: Use motion and feedback to guide the user through your flow, reducing cognitive load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Framer Motion component for a progress bar that animates smoothly between onboarding steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'implement animated progress bar in OnboardingLayout.tsx'

steps.title: Add Analytics Hook
steps.description: Measure drop-off points to optimize your onboarding funnel—a skill that separates juniors from seniors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom React hook to track onboarding step completion events to a generic analytics provider.

pro_tips: Always implement a 'Skip' option; forcing users through onboarding creates resentment, not engagement.
Use optimistic UI updates for progress bars to make the application feel instantaneous.
Store onboarding data in a separate table from your primary User model to keep your database normalized.
Implement server-side validation on every step of the onboarding to prevent corrupted data from entering your backend.
Add 'empty state' hints during onboarding to teach users how to use your app before they even reach the dashboard.
content.next_steps: Now that you have a functioning onboarding flow, integrate it into a real SaaS boilerplate and deploy it to Vercel to see how users interact with your funnel.
content.conversion_block: Stop building toy projects that go nowhere. Master the infrastructure that drives revenue and user retention. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
